It identifies the mathematical spine of the cited chapter and gives the entry a concrete equation, symbol key, and derivation chain for the four-page production layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: This is a chronological narrative review layer. It keeps conversational development separate from source truth promotion. technical context candidate needs source alignment : 3612 narrative explanatory only : 2103 cleanup reference do not print raw : 1597 context candidate review : 1102 narrative hypothesis only guardrails required : 85 The entry should be read as part of the larger Opera Omnia progression: a local equation is selected, its surrounding prose supplies the physical or mathematical role, and the production packet keeps that source connection visible.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: The equation progression records 360^\circ \times 360^\circ = 129{,}600 \text{ distinct angular nodes}. These relations give the support page enough structure to show how the canonical formula arises from nearby source material rather than from a disconnected title alone.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: The supporting lemma is source locality: the selected relation appears in CONVERSATION_IDEA_TIMELINE_latest.md, and the adjacent context connects it to the title, domain, and surrounding argument. The packet therefore treats the formula, its explanatory paragraph, and its neighboring equations as one evidence cluster.
